{{Quote|There. The large asteroid with the slow rotation. That's our base.|Force Commander Mitth'raw'nuruodo|<ref name="OBF" />}}
'''Crustai asteroid base''' was the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] headquarters of [[Picket Force Two/Legends|Picket Force Two]] of the [[Chiss Expansionary Fleet/Legends|Chiss Expansionary Fleet]], on the borders of the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]]. The base was actually hidden inside the [[Unidentified asteroid (Crustai system)|asteroid]]. [[Force Commander]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]] was in charge of the base for some time. The base contained a [[welcoming chamber]] used in formal [[Welcoming ceremony|welcoming ceremonies]] for visiting [[Officer/Legends|officers]] and officials.<ref name="OBF" />

{{Chiss-stub}}
